docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $715.00 FILED BY S AND C MOTORS INC AS TO DEFENDANT VANDENBERHE NADINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-16-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF AUG-30-1996 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PLTF DECLARATION THAT DEFT WAS NOT SERVED FOR THE 8/30/96,1:30 PM,DEPT C HRG.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT VANDENBERHE NADINE
